top_signals.title: Professor Momoko Kitada Receives IMO Gender Equality Award
top_signals.summary: Japanese maritime academic and former seafarer Professor Momoko Kitada has been awarded the International Maritime Organization’s Gender Equality Award 2026. The award was presented by IMO Secretary-General Arsenio Dominguez during a ceremony…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Sweden picks France’s FDI frigates in potential $4.2 billion deal
top_signals.summary: Sweden picked the French vessel due to a combination of quick delivery time, an active production line and proven air-defense capabilities, officials said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
